steps: File dividend tax refund claim with Skat for DKK 153,600 excess withholding on Novo Nordisk (ISIN DK0010244508)
Submit documentation showing Norwegian tax residency and DK-NO treaty 15% rate entitlement
Request Danske Bank Custody provide official withholding certificate for the claim
Follow up with Skat using their online claim tracking system within 6 months

references.title: Skat.dk – Claiming Refund of Danish Dividend Tax
Skat.dk – Online Claim Form for Dividend Tax Refund
